data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed commit 28cedb557f444696776b2b7ea78826f0179fc0ca on branch codex/2f19-overview-annotations against the annotation acceptance criteria. Diff is scoped to overview grouping/display, lease info projection, compact state labels, tests, and a minimal mobile header wrap fix. Test coverage exercises shipped filtering, required empty columns, full-vs-short overview labels, active states, and lease metadata extraction. Recorded gates and browser checks satisfy the knot acceptance criteria; no invariants, regressions, or security concerns found.
